true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy and <color=#28d9ed>heals</color> the ally with the lowest current Health by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> of the target's Max Health.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy and <color=#28d9ed>heals</color> the ally with the lowest current Health by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> of the target's Max Health.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks an enemy and <color=#28d9ed>heals</color> the ally with the lowest current Health by <color=#28d9ed>7%</color> of the target's Max Health.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks an enemy and <color=#28d9ed>heals</color> the ally with the lowest current Health by <color=#28d9ed>7%</color> of the target's Max Health.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy and <color=#28d9ed>heals</color> the ally with the lowest current Health by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> of the target's Max Health.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、残りHPが最も低い味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復させる。

true_desc_levels.1: Heals all allies by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> and removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color>. The healing is increased by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> on targets inflicted with a debuff.
true_desc_levels.2: Heals all allies by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> and removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color>. The healing is increased by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> on targets inflicted with a debuff.
true_desc_levels.3: Heals all allies by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> and removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color>. The healing is increased by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> on targets inflicted with a debuff.
true_desc_levels.4: Heals all allies by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> and removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color>. The healing is increased by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> on targets inflicted with a debuff.
true_desc_levels.5: Heals all allies by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> and removes <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color>. The healing is increased by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> on targets inflicted with a debuff.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:攻撃後、残りHPが最も低い味方単体のHPを回復する。回復量は対象の最大HPが高いほどUPする。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、残りHPが最も低い味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を回復させる。回復量は自分の最大HPが高いほどUPする。
